headline: Test harnesses become the central battleground in AI agent evaluation as Meta-style approaches take hold.
body: A shift toward Meta's testing harnesses as the dominant evaluation standard is the window's clearest move, with Omnigent shipping an open-source meta harness for agents alongside it. Geopolitical friction is escalating: Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, Europe pushed back on Washington's semiconductor export controls, and Cerebras stock fell after a margin-outlook miss in its first public earnings. On the practitioner side, coverage centered on code generation and token efficiency, including reports on how LLM code style affects token costs and concern over LLMs displacing precise human programming work. Breakouts skewed technical, with data augmentation, multilingual speech, and generative AI all surfacing as new entrants.
